title: COT 4400 – Analysis of Algorithms
text: 3/29/26, 12.23 AM COT 4400 Analysis of Algorithms University of South Florida COT 4400 Analysis of Algorithms Credit(s): 3 Design principles and analysis techniques applicable to various classes of computer algorithms frequently used in practice.
